narrative: Middle East tensions and US-Iran policy uncertainty drive the session's risk premium, though markets largely shrug off claims that the ceasefire has ended. USD/JPY retreats to 161.36 as Japan urges pension funds to invest in domestic assets, while the 275bp Fed-BoJ OIS carry limit downside. Gold lower -0.53% near $4,119; equities +0.21%; DXY -0.13%; VIX 15.4. Watch the BoC rate decision on July 15 as the next key policy catalyst.
